languages.text: {n}Себериан устало кивает, и вы слышите глухое клацанье аугментированных позвонков под его тяжелым плащом.{/n}
{n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан устало кивает, и вы слышите глухое клацанье аугментированных позвонков под его тяжелым плащом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian nickt müde und du hörst das dumpfe Klappern seiner augmentierten Wirbelsäule unter seinem schweren Mantel.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian nickt müde und du hörst das dumpfe Klappern seiner augmentierten Wirbelsäule unter seinem schweren Mantel.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian vous adresse un signe de tête fatigué, et vous entendez le cliquetis étouffé de ses vertèbres augmentées sous sa lourde cape.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian vous adresse un signe de tête fatigué, et vous entendez le cliquetis étouffé de ses vertèbres augmentées sous sa lourde cape.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian asiente, cansado, y oyes el traqueteo de sus vértebras aumentadas bajo su pesado abrigo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian asiente, cansado, y oyes el traqueteo de sus vértebras aumentadas bajo su pesado abrigo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian, yorgunca şekilde başını sallıyor. Ağır paltosunun altındaki ogmetik omurgasının donuk tıkırtısını duyuyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, yorgunca şekilde başını sallıyor. Ağır paltosunun altındaki ogmetik omurgasının donuk tıkırtısını duyuyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安疲惫地点了点头，你能听见他厚重外套下脊椎骨植入物传来的沉闷咔嗒声。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安疲惫地点了点头，你能听见他厚重外套下脊椎骨植入物传来的沉闷咔嗒声。{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは疲れて首を振る。彼の重いコートの下で、骨の強化が鈍く音を立てている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian nods wearily, and you hear the dull clack of his augmented vertebrae beneath his heavy coat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは疲れて首を振る。彼の重いコートの下で、骨の強化が鈍く音を立てている。{/n}
